questions.question: Iron( II) chloride solution reacts with chlorine gas. A 1 and 2 B    2 and 3 C    2 and 4 D    3 and 4 7

questions.question: A steel bicycle which had been left outdoors for several months was starting to rust. What would not reduce the rate of corrosion?
